titleStmt.title: SII 16.205: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 205. (A.R. No. 59 of 1915.) CHINNA AHŌBALAM, SIRVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the Narasiṁhasvāmin shrine in the Narasiṁhasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1478 (current), Rākshasa, Śrāvaṇa ba. 7 corresponding to 1555 A.D., August 9 (Friday).

The record is damaged and fragmentary. It seems to register a gift (of land) to god Āhōbala Narasiṁha by Ghaṇapatidēva-maharāju who belonged to the Kāśyapagōtra Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajuś-s11ākha and was the son of Nandirāju and the grandson of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kṛishṇarāju of the solar race.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrī nārasiṁhāya namaḥ . yētatsurāsurādhīśamauḷimālā
virājitaṁ . Ahōbalanṛsiṁhvasya dēvadēvaśca śāsanaṁ . dēvaśrēṇiśirōratnaṁ daityadvipa gha
ṭāṁkkuśaṁ . jayatu śrīnarasiṁhvasya dēvadēvasya śāsanaṁ . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śāli vāhana śakava[¨rṣa]
ṁbulu 1478 Aguvēṭi rākṣasa saṁvvatsara śrāvaṇa ba 7 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsatāśivadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu
vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthivisāṁbrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu svasti śrīcatu¨rbhuvanā
dhīśvara śrīAhōbala vīranaraśiṁhvadēvuni divyaśrīpādapadmārādhakulayina kāśyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁba sū
traṁ yajuśyākhyādhyāyulayina sūryavaṁśōdbhavulayina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
kriṣṇamarājuṁgāri pautṛḍaina naṁdirājuṁgāri putrulaina ghaṇapati dēvamahārājuluṁgā
ru Anaṁttamulaina daṁḍamulunu sama¨rpiṁci yiccina sthaḷālalōnu perumāḷlu ĀraThe record stops here.
Digital edition of SII 16.205 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
